kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Verify host is reachable
Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.arg: Host ${Address} is not reachable. Ping output:\n ${result.stdout}\n
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
Pings the host to ensure it's reachable.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Fatal Error
kw.doc: Stops the whole test execution.

test.name: Validate SSH Credentials

kw.name: Validate SSH Credentials
Load Credentials
Get Environment Variable
kw.doc: Returns the value of an environment variable with the given name.

kw.name: Get Environment Variable
kw.doc: Returns the value of an environment variable with the given name.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.arg: TREX_USER is not set. Did you source trex.env?
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.arg: TREX_PASS is not set. Did you source trex.env?
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.
Ensures TREX_USER and TREX_PASS are available.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Open Connection
kw.doc: Opens a new SSH connection to the given ``host`` and ``port``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Fatal Error
kw.arg: SSH connection refused — host reachable but port 22 is closed.
kw.doc: Stops the whole test execution.

kw.name: Fatal Error
kw.arg: SSH connection timed out — host unreachable or firewall blocking.
kw.doc: Stops the whole test execution.

kw.name: Fatal Error
kw.doc: Stops the whole test execution.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Login
kw.msg:

${login_message} = Welcome to Ubuntu 18.04.6 LTS (GNU/Linux 4.15.0-213-generic x86_64)

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Fatal Error
kw.arg: SSH login failed — invalid username or password.
kw.doc: Stops the whole test execution.

kw.name: Fatal Error
kw.doc: Stops the whole test execution.

kw.name: Close All Connections
kw.doc: Closes all open connections.

kw.name: Run Command
Execute Command
kw.doc: Executes ``command`` on the remote machine and returns its outputs.
Runs a command and returns stdout.

kw.name: Strip String
kw.doc: Remove leading and/or trailing whitespaces from the given string.

kw.name: Split String
kw.doc: Splits the ``string`` using ``separator`` as a delimiter string.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

test.name: Validation of Mellanox Driver

kw.name: Validation of Mellanox Driver
Run Command
Execute Command
kw.doc: Executes ``command`` on the remote machine and returns its outputs.
Runs a command and returns stdout.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.msg: Mellanox driver is not installed on host 10.0.0.26. Output: : '' does not contain 'mlx5_core'
kw.arg: Mellanox driver is not installed on host ${host}. Output: ${output}
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
kw.status: Mellanox driver is not installed on host 10.0.0.26. Output: : '' does not contain 'mlx5_core'

kw.doc: Checks if Mellanox driver is installed on the host.
kw.status: Mellanox driver is not installed on host 10.0.0.26. Output: : '' does not contain 'mlx5_core'

test.doc: Checks if Mellanox driver is installed on the host.
test.status: Mellanox driver is not installed on host 10.0.0.26. Output: : '' does not contain 'mlx5_core'

kw.doc: Runs a command and returns stdout.

kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

Runs a command and returns stdout.

kw.doc: Remove leading and/or trailing whitespaces from the given string.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

Execute Command

test.name: Check Required PIP Packages

kw.name: PIP Packages check
PIP Package check
Run Command
Execute Command
kw.msg: ${output} = Name: distro Version: 1.9.0 Summary: Distro - an OS platform information API Home-page: https://github.com/python-distro/distro Author: Nir Cohen Author-email: nir36g@gmail.com License: Apache License...
kw.doc: Executes ``command`` on the remote machine and returns its outputs.

kw.msg: ${output} = Name: distro Version: 1.9.0 Summary: Distro - an OS platform information API Home-page: https://github.com/python-distro/distro Author: Nir Cohen Author-email: nir36g@gmail.com License: Apache License...
kw.doc: Runs a command and returns stdout.

kw.name: Strip String
kw.msg: ${clean} = Name: distro Version: 1.9.0 Summary: Distro - an OS platform information API Home-page: https://github.com/python-distro/distro Author: Nir Cohen Author-email: nir36g@gmail.com License: Apache License...
kw.doc: Remove leading and/or trailing whitespaces from the given string.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: Pip package ${package} is not installed. Output: ${clean}
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Verifies that a specific pip package is installed on the host.

kw.name: PIP Package check
Run Command
Execute Command
kw.msg: ${output} = Name: scapy Version: 2.5.0 Summary: Scapy: interactive packet manipulation tool Home-page: https://scapy.net Author: Philippe BIONDI Author-email: guillaume@valadon.net License: GPL-2.0-only Location:...
kw.doc: Executes ``command`` on the remote machine and returns its outputs.

kw.msg: ${output} = Name: scapy Version: 2.5.0 Summary: Scapy: interactive packet manipulation tool Home-page: https://scapy.net Author: Philippe BIONDI Author-email: guillaume@valadon.net License: GPL-2.0-only Location:...
kw.doc: Runs a command and returns stdout.

kw.name: Strip String
kw.msg: ${clean} = Name: scapy Version: 2.5.0 Summary: Scapy: interactive packet manipulation tool Home-page: https://scapy.net Author: Philippe BIONDI Author-email: guillaume@valadon.net License: GPL-2.0-only Location:...
kw.doc: Remove leading and/or trailing whitespaces from the given string.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: Pip package ${package} is not installed. Output: ${clean}
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Verifies that a specific pip package is installed on the host.
Loops through a list of pip packages and verifies each is installed.

test.doc: Verifies that required pip packages are installed on the host.

test.name: TRex Version Check

kw.name: TRex Version Check - Folder
Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Command
Execute Command
kw.msg: Executing command 'test -d /opt/Trex/3.06 && echo exists || echo missing'.
kw.doc: Executes ``command`` on the remote machine and returns its outputs.
Runs a command and returns stdout.

kw.name: Strip String
kw.doc: Remove leading and/or trailing whitespaces from the given string.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Run Command
Execute Command
kw.msg: Executing command 'test -f /opt/Trex/3.06/t-rex-64 && echo exists || echo missing'.

Runs a command and returns stdout.

kw.name: Strip String
kw.doc: Remove leading and/or trailing whitespaces from the given string.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.arg: TRex binary missing in version folder: ${full_path}/t-rex-64
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: TRex version folder and binary validated: /opt/Trex/3.06
kw.arg: TRex version folder and binary validated: ${full_path}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Validates that the TRex version folder exists and contains the t-rex-64 binary.

test.doc: Validated the folder name contains the expected version number, and that the t-rex-64 binary exists within that folder.

test.name: Check DPDK Bound Interfaces

kw.name: Check DPDK Bound Interfaces
Run Command
Execute Command
kw.doc: Executes ``command`` on the remote machine and returns its outputs.
Runs a command and returns stdout.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: Expected PCI device ${pci} not bound to any DPDK driver. Output: ${output}
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: Expected PCI device ${pci} not bound to any DPDK driver. Output: ${output}
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Verifies that the expected PCI NICs are bound to a DPDK driver without requiring sudo.

test.doc: Verifies that the expected PCI NICs are bound to a DPDK driver without requiring sudo.

test.name: Check TRex configuration file exists

Run Command
Execute Command

Runs a command and returns stdout.

kw.name: Should Be Equal

test.name: Validate TRex configuration file

kw.name: Compare TRex cfg.yaml
Run Command
Execute Command
kw.msg:
${output} = ### Config file generated by dpdk_setup_ports.py ###
- version: 2 interfaces: ['03:00.0', '03:00.1'] port_info: - ip: 1.1.1.1 default_gw: 2.2.2.2 - ip: 2.2.2.2 default...
kw.doc: Executes ``command`` on the remote machine and returns its outputs.

kw.msg:
${raw} = ### Config file generated by dpdk_setup_ports.py ###
- version: 2 interfaces: ['03:00.0', '03:00.1'] port_info: - ip: 1.1.1.1 default_gw: 2.2.2.2 - ip: 2.2.2.2 default...
kw.doc: Runs a command and returns stdout.
